creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
can you show where "shelf" is executing tradcpp?

Tradcpp is much newer than xplore.  Xplore came in ports in 2003.  tradcpp came 10 years later in 2013.  I'm a bit skeptical that /usr/local/bin/tradcpp was required years before it existed so I'd like to see how it's getting called.
